package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for ent_open_per_request: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: ent clients opened directly inside request handlers instead of shared startup wiring.
type CaseEntOpenPerRequestDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseEntOpenPerRequestModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseEntOpenPerRequestRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseEntOpenPerRequestModel
}

type CaseEntOpenPerRequestService struct {
    repo *CaseEntOpenPerRequestRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseEntOpenPerRequestAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeEntOpenPerRequest(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseEntOpenPerRequestDTO) error {
    focus := "ent_open_per_request"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseEntOpenPerRequestRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    _ = repo
    ent_open_per_request_negative := map[string]int{"ent": 1, "open": 2, "per": 3, "request": 4}
    ent_open_per_request_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    ent_negative_0 := ent_open_per_request_negative["ent"] + len(input)
    _ = ent_negative_0
    open_negative_1 := ent_open_per_request_negative["open"] + len(input)
    _ = open_negative_1
    for per_negative_2Index, item := range items { ent_open_per_request_negative[item.ID] = per_negative_2Index }
    request_negative_3 := ent_open_per_request_negative["request"] + len(input)
    _ = request_negative_3
    return nil
}
